channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download Desktop.ini Editor 1.2
item.description: The desktop.ini file is a hidden Windows operating system configuration settings file located in every folder and is used to store information about how Windows folders are organized. Basically, if the layout or settings for a folder is changed, a desktop.ini file is automatically created to save those changes. Information about Desktop.ini Editor software Desktop.ini Editor is a portable freeware to simplify Desktop.ini operations, it can help you to edit desktop.ini files and set...

item.title: Download Perfectly Clear WorkBench 5.1.0.3179
item.description: Perfectly Clear Workbench is an application that uses image editing libraries Perfectly Clear by Athentech and is provided to demonstrate the capabilities of the Perfectly Clear processing libraries, which recognize faces and allow quick export of processing settings for use. One of the key features in Workbench is the ability to "export to API" when saving a Preset. This allows you to make image edits in Workbench and adjust the settings to suit your editing style and needs. You can...

You can double-click on a date to quickly add notes and also jump to specific dates in the past or future. The software comes with support for FTP and secure FTP servers, SSH, WebDAV, Amazon S3, http, update the part file, ZIP compression, data encryption, and schedule automatic backups. Syncovery Pro Enterprise have the ability to freely select files and folders across the whole folder hierarchy in tree view and supports email...

item.title: Download PassFab 4EasyPartition 4.0.1.0
item.description: After using your PC for many years, there are bound to be many files you want to transfer to your new PC. PassFab 4EasyPartition can perform a one-click migration saving you hours of reinstalling operating systems and applications. It has an intuitive interface and step-by-step wizard that makes migrating the system in just a few steps. PassFab 4EasyPartition will effectively solve the problem of low disk space, speed up your computer and make it run faster. Features of PassFab...

item.title: Download EverNote 11.11.2.6992
item.description: EverNote is the all in one tool allows you to track notes, todo items, memos, outlines, excerpts, websites, ideas and other things and automatically synchronize them between multiple computers and mobile devices (iPhone, Android, etc.). You can choose to sort their notes into categories, password protect them, export them to XML and more. EverNote supports a number of pattern notes allow you to add to-do list, spreadsheet like Excel to calculate costs (automatic sum), notes, phone, contact...

It allows you to quickly analyze, verify and review any NTFS folder permissions and provides additional features like powerful, customizable filtering, exporting to different formats, etc. Features of NTFS Permissions Auditor Pro Get up and running with just one install. item.title: Download FastNeuron BackupChain 4.1.5507
item.description: BackupChain is a powerful, easy-to-use backup software for IT professionals. It is a fully automated and configurable solution that offers file versioning, deduplication, and delta compression. Additionally, BackupChain offers Hyper-V virtual machine backup and database protection, as well as a powerful multi-threading engine for parallel processing. Files, databases and virtual machines can be easily copied to network servers, USB, iSCSI, local drives and FTP. Features of FastNeuron...

item.title: Download MemoryCleaner 1.9.8
item.description: MemoryCleaner is a tool to free up memory on your computer. This is a free app with a simple user interface that makes it easy for users of all skill levels to use. You can also access Memory Cleaner's functions right from the system tray without having to open the program. The cleaning processes are silent and the only time you see a warning is to briefly display the amount of RAM...
